page: Google Cloud Platform a3-megagpu-8g is an accelerator-optimized server powered by an Intel Xeon 8481C processor with an x86_64 architecture. It features 208 dedicated vCPUs, corresponding to 104 physical cores with hyper-threading, operating at a base frequency of 2.7 GHz. The processing architecture is supported by a 105 MB L3 cache and advanced instruction sets, including Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions (AMX) and Advanced Vector Extensions (AVX-512). The system is equipped with 1872.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 9.0 GB of RAM per core.

For parallel processing and acceleration, the server integrates eight NVIDIA Hopper H100 GPUs, delivering a combined 637 GB of VRAM. Local storage is provided via 6432 GB of high-speed NVMe SSDs. In benchmark evaluations, this hardware configuration achieves top-tier performance, placing in the top 10% for multi-core CPU execution, memory bandwidth, and database operations. It also demonstrates strong performance in single-threaded compression and medium-model LLM text generation.

Given its high-density hardware profile, this server represents a specialized tier designed for extreme computational demands. The inclusion of eight enterprise-grade GPUs and extensive local NVMe storage makes it highly efficient for massive parallel workloads. It is structurally optimized for large-scale machine learning training, deep learning inference, high-performance computing, and complex data science pipelines.
description: Google Cloud Platform a3-megagpu-8g is an accelerator-optimized server designed for high-compute and parallel processing workloads. It features an Intel Xeon 8481C processor with 208 dedicated vCPUs, 1872.0 GB of system memory, and 6432 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. The server's primary processing power is driven by eight NVIDIA Hopper H100 GPUs delivering 637 GB of total VRAM. In benchmark testing, the instance achieves top-tier performance in multi-core CPU execution, memory bandwidth, and database operations. It also demonstrates strong capabilities in LLM text generation for medium-sized models. This hardware profile is engineered for resource-intensive tasks, making it highly suitable for large-scale machine learning training, deep learning inference, high-performance computing, and massive data analytics.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform a3-megagpu-8g is an accelerator-optimized server featuring 208 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 1872 GB of RAM, 6432 GB of NVMe SSD storage, and eight NVIDIA Hopper H100 GPUs with 637 GB of total VRAM.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform a3-megagpu-8g is an accelerator-optimized server with 208 vCPUs, 1872 GB RAM, and eight NVIDIA H100 GPUs for high-performance computing.
tagline: An accelerator-optimized platform featuring eight NVIDIA H100 GPUs, massive system memory, and high-speed local NVMe storage for intensive parallel computing.
bullet_points: Eight NVIDIA Hopper H100 GPUs with 637 GB of total VRAM
208 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 1872 GB of system memory
6432 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage
Top-tier multi-core CPU performance and memory bandwidth
Optimized for machine learning training, LLM inference, and HPC
